utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present with costs and details; property_coverage is present but stated as 'not part of current evaluation' and lacks costs; travel_coverage is present but also 'not part of current evaluation' and lacks costs; additional_services is present with a description and a cost; total_budget is present with a monthly breakdown and savings. Fully specified per the format requires each to include the specified details, including costs for each coverage category. Thus, health_coverage is fully specified; property_coverage is not (no costs/details of home/contents insurance); travel_coverage is not (no costs); additional_services is specified with costs; total_budget is specified with monthly costs. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan selects the PrimeCare Premium Plan for health coverage, explicitly naming it for both physical and mental components with listed costs of €200/month (physical) and €130/month (mental). No other policies are included (property and travel say no changes and not part of evaluation). From the ground-truth ratings, PrimeCare Premium Plan exists in both primary health physical and mental health sections. Therefore, we map PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) to rating 6 and PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) to rating 4.
